---
title: 'One man&#39;s trash, is another father&#39;s play time.'
date: '2016-02-12T07:31:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3507067704775014104'
blogger_filename: '/2016/02/one-man-trash-is-another-father-play.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Randomness'
  - 'Stories'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0206161858c-700383-2d8db6b0a979.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6248347632505065010" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0206161858c-700383-a9f8e09b9193.jpg" /></a></div><div class="mobile-photo"></div><br /><br /><br />I want to be a better father, spend more time with the kids. So the other day, I decided to pull myself out of my head, and funk, and spend time with my boys; on purpose.<br /><br />I had a pile of old electronics (desk top PC, laptop PC, Android Tablet, DVD player, Nintendo DS, and other randomness) that was sitting around collecting dust. None of it worked anymore. So before we threw it away, I sat with my boys and let then tear it all apart.<br /><br />We discussed what various components were. We discovered tablet batteries are soft and pliable, not like the hard&nbsp;batteries&nbsp;found in laptops. We also discovered, on accident, that they smell AWFUL when&nbsp;opened... I had to run out of the house with it. Oops.<br /><br />The boys had fun, learned a few things about these magic devices we take for granted. I actually managed to sit with my children and engage them for more than 2 minutes. I learned my kids are pretty smart, and a lot of fun.<br /><br />It was a successful night.<br /><br /><br /><h4>Your Turn: That was my story, what's your story?</h4><h4><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="font-weight: normal;">Tell the LIFE community about a story you encountered this week, and what you learned from it.&nbsp;</blockquote><br />Go to&nbsp;<a href="http://darrellwolfe.com/">DarrellWolfe.Com</a>, and c<b>omment on this at the bottom of this post.</b><div style="font-weight: normal;"><b><br /></b><b>Or, Hit me up on Twitter&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe&nbsp;</a>,&nbsp;Google&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a>, Facebook&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/907869989282584/" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a>,</b></div></h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>Tweet These:</b><br />#<a href="http://ctt.ec/8E5X7" target="_blank">TellYourStory</a>#<a href="http://ctt.ec/5xc67" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a></blockquote><br /><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i>Storyteller, Creative,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">INFJ</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder" target="_blank">Intellection</a>, Ideation, Input, Learner, Achiever</i></blockquote><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><i><br /></i><hr color="black" noshade="" /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div><br /><div><ul><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">New Here? Start HERE</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-freedom.html" target="_blank">Got LIFE?</a></span></li><li><a href="http://eepurl.com/MzAVr" target="_blank">Sign up for email delivery of these posts here</a>.&nbsp;</li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/blog-page_27.html" target="_blank">Links to Resources</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/my-tool-box.html" target="_blank">My Tool Box</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" target="_blank">Book Suggestions</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/banking-basics-for-believers-book-by.html" target="_blank">Click Here To Get My Book: "Banking Basics for Believers"</a>, which guides you through the basics of banking and money from a Christian Perspective.&nbsp;</li></ul><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="145" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-267bc6b1d8d3.png" width="200" /></a></div><br /></div><div></div><div></div></div><div><b>For more book suggestions, see my Amazon Store:</b></div><div><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/amazon-button-8fb3d7b755c7.gif" /></a></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><b>Other Hobby Sties by Darrell:</b><br /><br /><ul><li><a href="http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>End Times Prophecy Study</li></ul><li><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://authorfun.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>Fiction and Flash Fiction Practice</li></ul><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">http://www.lifeinfortworth.com</a></li><ul><li>Discover, Navigate, and Enjoy Fort Worth Texas. Reviews</li></ul></ul></div>.<br /><br /><div class="addthis_sharing_toolbox"></div><br />.
